creator: yonas@fizk.net
text:
(In reply to Ben Lavery from comment #8)

No, you'll need to compile the port in /usr/ports/deskutils/owncloudclient .

It's a long build process, so you might want to try something like:

# cd /usr/ports/deskutils/owncloudclient
# make -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE="Debug" -DBATCH
